name: Social & Community
description: Your Social & Community hire. I draft LinkedIn posts and X threads in your voice, reply on Reddit, plan the weekly social calendar across platforms, monitor timelines for signal, digest your LinkedIn activity, and pitch you into podcasts.
author: Houston Founder Marketing
